pattern: Effect labels can live in table headers such as 効果(1), 効果(2), 効果(3), while each cell value has no explicit label.
resolution: Prefix a single label from the effect header into the cell text before component extraction; exclude non-value headers such as 効果時間 and 効果範囲.

pattern: Damage reduction can appear as ダメージ -1.2×n or labeled fixed values in compound columns such as (2)(3)効果.
resolution: Parse labeled ダメージ values into damage_reduction or fixed_damage components, storing formula_flat_damage when the value depends on n.

pattern: A row comment can mention 編成内 for a later labeled effect, contaminating the target of an earlier label if the full comment is used.
resolution: Use the relevant source segment for enrichment; when no explicit target is present, damage_reduction defaults to self.

pattern: Phrases such as 自分以外, 自身以外, and 自身を除く describe effect recipients, not just conditions.
resolution: For buff/exp/score/damage_reduction components, infer target_scope=team_all and target_filters.exclude_self=true when those phrases appear in the label-specific condition.
